children.text: to promote, develop, supervise, and voluntarily assist in all lawful ways the interest of young people who participate in Little League baseball;
to help and voluntarily assist young people in developing qualities of citizenship and sportsmanship; and

using the disciplines of the native American game of baseball, to teach spirit and competitive will to win, physical fitness through individual sacrifice, the values of team play, and wholesome well being through healthy social association with other youngsters under proper leadership.
